race.comment: POWER DANCER (7) returns. Left himself with too much to do throughout his debut prep when getting too far back but the form around him has stuck up. Looks to have come on a treat during the break, stripping fitter for two strong trial wins. Expecting a bright return. KAYLA KRUZEN (12) is going well and is destined to break through soon. AUSTRALIA FOREVER (11) returns. Caught the eye in both runs in her debut prep and can pounce on them late. NAVY ROK (6) also resumes and is among the hopes. A market lead will add confidence.
